channel.title: Musiks on LZY Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Musiks on LZY Blog

item.title: 2025年月度精选歌单汇总
item.description: <iframe style="border-radius:12px" src="https://open.spotify.com/embed/playlist/59HoCyoTC1CaeEgHNNHBoe?utm_source=generator" width="100%" height="450" frameBorder="0" allowfullscreen="" allow="autoplay;
